data.body: AC amendment (Gap: implicit_assumption): figma-resync.py MUST source figma-tags.conf and use tag constants (not hardcoded strings). Verify dbd2-993e has added TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW=design:awaiting_review to figma-tags.conf before implementing the precondition check. Add AC: 'figma-resync.py sources plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf and uses $TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW (not hardcoded string) for precondition check'. Verify: grep -q 'TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW' plugins/dso/scripts/figma-resync.py
